note: This EPD declares 1 m3 of ready-mix concrete but reports separate A1-A3 results for many concrete grades (M-7.5 to M-60), with no single aggregated value, so a unique GWP cannot be given. GWP-total A1-A3 ranges by grade: M7.5=96.8, M10=100, M20=166, M25=171, M30=245, M35=257, M40=256, M45=317, M50=451, M60=480 kg CO2 eq. Corresponding GWP-fossil ranges 96.3 (M7.5) to 479 (M60) and GWP-biogenic ranges 0.446 (M7.5) to ~2.76 (M45). Values left null because no representative/aggregate grade is defined.
